Only the cost 7 should have returned while the cost 2 should have been sent to the discard pile.

The problems are basically 2: 
-> First: When try to play a character as an with its effect ugprade, it is not play as an upgrade, it is played normally, however I still pay the UPGRADE cost instead of the normal cost. Not only that, it has the double character issue. For example: I try to play a hidden cost 4 temari with this effect on the same mission as a cost 2 temari. It should play as an upgrade automatically because there is already a card with the same name as the card I'm trying to play on the mission (Temari). However it does play it normally and the card stay on that mission (2 temari on the same mission). But since it was played normally I expected the cost to be 3 (4 - 1 (from kankuro's effect)) but I actually paid just 1, the upgrade cost (4 - 2 (from cost 2 temari) - 1 (kankuro's effect))

-> Second: It does not give me the option to upgrade when the character has a different name. Example: I tried to play with Kankuro's UPGRADE effect a hidden One-Tail (Partial Transformation) that has the effect (MAIN ⧗ You can play this character as an upgrade over Gaara), on the same mission as a Cost 3 Gaara. The SIM should give me two options, Play the card normally (Reveal 6-1) (since One-Tail does not share the same name as gaara) OR Play as an Upgrade over the Gaara (Reveal + Upgrade 6-3-1) (due to One-Tails MAIN effect). But instead, the sim is just Playing the card normally.

When playing by a Card Effect a character that can UPGRADE on top of a character with different name, the sim should give you an option to play normally (without Upgrading) or play as an Upgrade and also let you choose on top of which character do you want to upgrade. The cards I linked are cards that has this ability of Play cards & Cards that can be upgrade over characters with different names

When an effect that hides or defeat multiple characters activates, Genma should be able to protect at least one before itself gets hidden/defeated. On the SIM everything gets hidden instead.

When Sasuke is played in this mission when there is already an non-hidden friendly character on the mission, both effects apply at the same time, Sasuke & Protect The Leader. So there are 2 scenario that I can choose

The first scenario, Sasuke's effect apply first. so it goes from 4 to 3, since it has 3 power the mission does not work on Sasuke (it only works with Power 4 or more)

The second scenario, Proctect The Leader apply first. In this case Sasuke goes from 4 to 5 Power, and then its effect apply, going for 5 to 4. AND, if I play another non-hidden friendly character on that mission it will go from 4 to 3 and it will lose its +1 Power from the mission, going to 2 of Power.

So first the game should allow me to decide which continuous effect apply first. 
Second, the way it is working right now on the SIM, sasuke becomes Power 2 even if I just have 1 non-hidden friendly character on that mission. Which does not make sense.

Round 2, there are just 2 Missions available.

I play sasuke, it forces me to move all other non-hidden friendly characters. I move 2, one of them is a sakura, but on the other mission there is already another sakura. Normally it would be an illegal play, but that only apply to optional effects, mandatory ones overules that block, so sakura should have moved aswell and then be discarded.

The way it is working on the SIM, only the other character is moved and Sakura stays on the mission with Sasuke.
